description_long: This is a single muffin with a fluted, light pink wrapper and a domed top generously covered in white, swirled frosting. The frosting is decorated with small, dark chocolate sprinkles scattered evenly across its surface, adding texture and visual interest. The muffin sits on a flat, dark brown wooden surface, which contrasts with the lighter tones of the muffin and its wrapper. The wrapper has a ribbed texture, typical of paper baking cups, and the frosting is piped in a spiral pattern, creating a soft, inviting appearance. The overall look is clean and appetizing, with the muffin appearing freshly made and ready to eat. There are no additional decorative elements or objects surrounding the muffin.
description: A muffin with white swirled frosting and chocolate sprinkles sits in a ribbed pink wrapper on a dark wooden surface. The frosting is piped in a spiral and the muffin looks fresh and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view of the muffin showing the full swirl of white frosting and chocolate sprinkles, with the ribbed pink wrapper clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view of the muffin, similar to the front, with the frosting swirl and sprinkles visible, but the lighting highlights the back of the wrapper.
description_view_2: Side view of the muffin, showing the height and dome of the frosting, with the ribbed wrapper and wooden surface in clear view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 2, with the frosting and sprinkles visible and the wrapper's texture highlighted.
